meta.description: IBKR pre-market research log. Appended each weekday run. Read by next run to detect changes.

runs.note: First real run. Data pulled via Interactive-Brokers MCP connector (local Client Portal Gateway was not reachable in this environment). Run executed Sunday for Monday 2026-07-06 open.

positions.catalystDesc: REGAL Phase 3 (GPS/AML) event-driven readout at 80th event; 78 events reported as of 2026-05-11 update. No calendar date — could trigger any time.
news: SELLAS Q1 2026 results (2026-05-11): REGAL trial at 78/80 events, median OS >13.5mo vs conventional therapy. Cash position $107.1M as of 2026-03-31.
8-K 2026-06-25: executive severance/change-of-control letter amendments (non-material to thesis).
$28.7M raised via warrant exercises in April-May 2026.

flags.detail: REGAL 80th event is event-driven and close (78/80 as of last update); timing unpredictable

positions.catalystDesc: Nasdaq-100 index inclusion effective 2026-07-07 (bypasses normal seasoning rule); est. $4.3B forced institutional buying. Separately: $25B senior notes offering settled 2026-06-26 (retired $20B bridge loan tied to xAI infra buildout). August lockup expiration is a further-out overhang, not yet imminent.
news: SpaceX priced $25B senior notes across 5 tranches (2031-2056 maturities), settled 2026-06-26, proceeds retire $20B bridge loan.
Nasdaq-100 inclusion effective 2026-07-07, ~$4.3B estimated forced index buying.
August lockup expiration flagged by press as a supply overhang to watch (not within 5-trading-day window yet).

flags.detail: Nasdaq-100 inclusion 2026-07-07 is 2 trading days out

news: FDA issued Complete Response Letter 2026-06-02 for CTx-1301 (ADHD) NDA — CMC issues cited, no clinical/safety/efficacy concerns raised.
Company pursuing CMC-driven resubmission with manufacturing partner; no new PDUFA date set yet.
~$30M cash, said to fund operations into 2027.

flags.detail: get_price_snapshot returned no usable intraday levels (weekend, no active session) and its SLS 'last' ($13.27) diverged ~14% from the position endpoint mark ($15.45); position-endpoint values used as authoritative for this run.
